summary: Iteration 6 (Codex + TTS audio + GPX + Share Badge) backend and frontend verified against the public preview URL. BACKEND: 20/20 pytest cases pass in /app/backend/tests/test_codex.py (16s) — public lore for all 5 regions, audio streaming with audio/mpeg content-type, on-the-fly TTS generation for an uncached region (east-lagoons) confirmed via curl: ~19s, 1,324,320 bytes, written to /app/backend/uploads/audio/east-lagoons.mp3 then served instantly on second request, admin auth gating (401/403 for anon on PATCH/POST regen/POST upload/DELETE), PATCH lore persists and invalidates cached audio (audio_ready flips to False), GPX upload validation (non-.gpx → 400, >5MB → 400, no <gpx> tag → 400, valid → parsed distance_km + elevation_m, appears in public /api/codex/region of the tour's region, downloads with application/gpx+xml ct, DELETE removes from disk + Mongo), audio regenerate endpoint returns 200 + audio_url. FRONTEND: (1) Region Codex on /dashboard → North Coast pin → region-scene → region-codex panel visible with 3 tabs (codex-tab-listen|read|gpx). Default Listen tab shows codex-audio-play (orange button). Read tab shows full lore (875 chars). Tracks tab shows empty state. Click play → audio.src set to https://…/api/codex/audio/north-coast and starts playing (paused→false), pause re-toggles after audio loads. (2) /admin Codex tab — admin-codex-card with 5 admin-codex-region-* sub-cards, Save button correctly disabled when clean / enabled when dirty / re-disabled after save success toast 'Lore saved. Audio will regenerate on next listen.' PATCH endpoint hit + UI refresh works (verified via title round-trip). (3) /admin GPX Tracks tab — 5 tour rows with admin-gpx-upload-* + hidden file inputs. Uploaded /tmp/ui_track.gpx (3 trkpts) to t-snorkel-blue-bay → list shows '3.0 km · 100 m gain' immediately, public GET /api/codex/region/east-lagoons returns the new file with distance_km=3.05 + elevation_m=100, delete button removes the item from the UI. (4) LOCKED region (black-river clicked by non-admin TEST player at 0XP) opens region-scene + shows region-locked overlay 'This region is sealed' AND the codex panel underneath (Kingdom of the Black Rivers + Listen/Read/Tracks) — confirmed by screenshot. (5) Dashboard fullscreen video <video> element present and all 5 map pins (map-region-{north-coast,black-river,south-wild,east-lagoons,central-culture}) render at correct positions. NOT TESTED end-to-end: ShareBadgeCard PNG save dialog — admin currently has 0/5 owned cards/seals on /badges, and the testid 'admin-force-award-*' was not present in the Bookings admin tab for the freshly-created confirmed booking (only force-awardable for COMPLETED bookings perhaps, or testid prefix differs). The component code (Badges.jsx + ShareBadgeCard.jsx) was code-reviewed and is wired correctly via html2canvas + anchor download, but a live click→PNG download was not exercised.

issues: Progress bar shows 0:00 / 0:00 until <audio> loadedmetadata fires (~1-2s after first play click). Consider a subtle skeleton/shimmer on the progress bar while audioLoading=true so the user knows it's buffering rather than broken.

action_items: (Optional / not blocking) Verify ShareBadgeCard PNG download end-to-end by either (a) seeding admin with one owned card via Mongo, or (b) wiring an admin endpoint that explicitly awards a card to a user_id+card_id pair so QA can repeatably exercise /badges → click owned → Save PNG. Currently the admin Bookings tab did not surface a force-award testid for a freshly-created 'confirmed' booking; clarify the trigger (probably bookings need status='completed' first via /api/bookings/complete which itself requires the guide PIN flow).
(Optional polish) Add a small loading shimmer to codex-audio-progress while audioLoading=true so users get feedback during the 1-2s metadata buffer.
critical_code_review_comments: codex.py _ensure_audio handles the 'TTS not configured' case with HTTPException(503) and the upstream failure with 502 — good error hygiene; logs full stack via logger.exception.

codex.py upload_gpx validates extension + size + content sniff (b'<gpx' in first 2KB) BEFORE writing to disk — correct ordering, but note that file.read() loads the whole upload into memory; with 5MB cap that's acceptable.
codex.py GPX parser handles both 1.0 and 1.1 GPX namespaces (good) and is wrapped in try/except so a malformed GPX still uploads but with distance_km/elevation_m=None — fine fallback.
codex.py PATCH update_lore unlinks the cached .mp3 to invalidate audio — verified working end-to-end (audio_ready flips to False after PATCH).
codex.py download_gpx and stream_audio both use FileResponse with explicit media_type — content-type header is correct (audio/mpeg, application/gpx+xml).

RegionCodex.jsx fetches /api/codex/region/{id} without sending credentials cookie (axios default w/o withCredentials) which IS intentional since the endpoint is public — confirmed by anon fetch returning 200.

RegionCodex.jsx togglePlay sets el.src on first click, but the React 'playing' state is only flipped by the onPlaying event handler — so a second rapid click while audio is still buffering will call el.play() again instead of pause(). Not a bug per se (browsers ignore play() on already-playing audio) but UX could be tightened by tracking an 'intent' state.
AdminCodex.jsx 'dirty' detection compares draft fields against the loaded region object — works. After save, load() re-fetches /regions and resets drafts, correctly re-disabling the Save button.
AdminGpx.jsx file input cleared after upload? Not visible in this test; if not cleared, the same file can't be re-uploaded without picking a different file. Worth verifying.
codex.py audio cache uses _safe(region_id).mp3 — region_ids are slug-like (north-coast etc.) so this is effectively identity; safe from path traversal.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% — all NEW codex/audio/GPX flows verified end-to-end; ShareBadgeCard PNG save was code-reviewed only because admin had no owned badges to click

test_credentials: Admin: admin@andeor.mu / AnDeor2026!. Ephemeral test player for locked-pin codex check: TEST_locked_<ts>@example.com / explore123 (registered via API, avatar=scholar, tutorial_completed=true).
seed_data_creation: One temporary GPX uploaded to t-snorkel-blue-bay (ui_track.gpx) then deleted within the same test — no residue. One temporary anon TTS .mp3 (east-lagoons.mp3) generated to verify on-the-fly TTS; left on disk as a cache warm-up. One ephemeral TEST_locked_* user created (no cleanup; not blocking).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Codex router lives at /api/codex prefix. Public endpoints: GET /api/codex/region/{region_id}, GET /api/codex/audio/{region_id} (auto-generates + caches on first request, ~15-25s), GET /api/codex/gpx/{tour_id}/{filename}. Admin endpoints (require_admin cookie): PATCH /api/codex/admin/region/{id}, POST /api/codex/admin/region/{id}/audio/regenerate, POST /api/codex/admin/tour/{id}/gpx (multipart), DELETE /api/codex/admin/tour/{id}/gpx/{filename}. Region IDs: north-coast, central-culture, black-river, east-lagoons, south-wild. Cached MP3s currently on disk: north-coast, central-culture, south-wild, east-lagoons (all warmed up by this iteration). black-river still un-cached as of iter6 close. Frontend testids added: region-codex, codex-title, codex-tab-{listen|read|gpx}, codex-panel-{tab}, codex-audio-play, codex-audio-progress, codex-gpx-list, codex-gpx-{i}, codex-gpx-download-{i}, admin-codex-card, admin-codex-region-{rid}, admin-codex-title-{rid}, admin-codex-summary-{rid}, admin-codex-text-{rid}, admin-codex-save-{rid}, admin-codex-regen-{rid}, admin-gpx-card, admin-gpx-tour-{tid}, admin-gpx-upload-{tid}, admin-gpx-item-{tid}-{filename}, admin-gpx-delete-{tid}-{filename}, admin-tab-codex, admin-tab-gpx. To repeatably exercise ShareBadgeCard, seed an owned card directly in Mongo: db.users.updateOne({email:'admin@andeor.mu'},{$addToSet:{cards:'card-blue-bay'}}). Then /badges → click data-testid='badge-card-blue-bay' (owned) → dialog with 'Save PNG' button. html2canvas runs client-side; assert via page.expect_download.
rca_of_the_issue: No new bugs identified in iter6 features. The earlier exploratory probe where region-codex panel returned null on a locked region was a test-script timing artefact (queried immediately after region-scene mount, before the axios GET /codex/region completed); the screenshot taken seconds later confirmed the codex IS rendered below the 'This region is sealed' overlay, matching the product spec.
